#include <string>
#include <unordered_set>
#include <vector>

std::vector<std::string> solve(std::string s) {
    std::unordered_set<std::string> seen;
    std::vector<std::string> segments;
    int current_start = 0;
    while (current_start < s.length()) {
        std::string current_segment;
        int current_char_index = current_start;
        while (current_char_index < s.length()) {
            current_segment += s[current_char_index];
            if (seen.find(current_segment) == seen.end()) {
                seen.insert(current_segment);
                break;
            } else {
                current_char_index++;
            }
        }
        segments.push_back(current_segment);
        current_start = current_char_index + 1;
    }
    return segments;
}
